title: SICP 3.3.1 mutable pairs, sharing, and cycles
goal: Add tests/sicp/ch3_mutable_pairs_cycles.esk covering set-car!/set-cdr!, sharing/aliasing, append!, cycles, count-pairs-style examples, and bounded cycle behavior.
